title: Water Supply Error
shortDescription: No water entering the washing machine.
fullDescription: Error E1 indicates the washer is not receiving water. Check supply taps, inlet hoses, and filter screens.

causes.cause: Primary component for water supply error has failed

symptoms: Problem related to water supply error
Error may flash as LED code

fixSteps.title: Reset the washer
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 5 minutes and restart.

fixSteps.title: Check the component
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect the component indicated by the error code.

fixSteps.title: Test electrically
fixSteps.instruction: Use a multimeter to verify component values.

fixSteps.title: Replace if faulty
fixSteps.instruction: Replace the identified part and run a test cycle.

whenToCallPro: If basic troubleshooting does not resolve the error, contact Gorenje service.

faq.q: What does Gorenje error E1 mean?
faq.a: No water entering the washing machine.

faq.q: How do I reset my Gorenje washer?
faq.a: Unplug the washer from the wall for 5 minutes, then plug it back in. This resets the control board.

faq.q: Is E1 a common error?
faq.a: This is a commonly reported Gorenje washing machine error. Most can be resolved with basic DIY troubleshooting.
